ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "bib_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each athlete (Bib number) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Category of the event the athlete participates in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the athlete */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team or club the athlete belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the athlete's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bib_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_category_name FOREIGN KEY ("category_name") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "bib_number" TEXT /* Bib number of the athlete related to the performance */,
  "rank_cat" INTEGER /* Rank category of the athlete for the event */,
  "gun_time" TEXT /* Gun time recorded for the performance */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "chip_time" TEXT /* Net time recorded for the performance (time from start line to finish line) */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Average pace per kilometer or mile */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* Split times at various points in the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_bib_number FOREIGN KEY ("bib_number") REFERENCES athletes ("bib_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., 10 WO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event category */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., walk, run) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the coach's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training log */,
  "bib_number" TEXT /* Bib number of the athlete */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered in the training session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training session */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the training session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the training session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the training log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_bib_number FOREIGN KEY ("bib_number") REFERENCES athletes ("bib_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user access record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
